heading: Resume Archiving Through the Atlas CLI
body:
To start a paused online archive for a cluster using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas clusters onlineArchives start <archiveId> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas clusters onlineArchives start](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-clusters-onlineArchives-start).
